body_txt: Humans drool for various reasons, including being hungry or sleepy . In this trope a character is horny, and drools while thinking about or in the presence of their Lust Object . This is often a silly visual gag Played for Laughs to show how ravenously a character is Eating the Eye Candy . Lust Makes You Dumb , so their expression is probably a slack-jawed idiotic grin. Compare Jaw Drop , Drool Deluge . Lustful Melt could be considered an Exaggerated variation. However, if a character does this along with something genuinely depraved (like harassment, Stalking , or Attempted Rape ) it becomes disgusting or horrifying. Compare *Drool* Hello and Phlegmings , and consider how such salivation portrays a creature as a predatory carnivore. Here, it marks a character as a Predatory Pervert . Compare Lecherous Licking . Compare Something Else Also Rises , for when arousal is depicted through a visual metaphor. Sister Trope to Nosebleed . See also Maniac Tongue and Wolf Whistle .
